name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, missed contract renewals cause cash flow gaps. We provide automated notifications instead of manual tracking of renewals and payments.
problem_solved: Missed contract renewals and payment notifications

locked_fields.primary_problem: Missed contract renewals and payment notifications
